creator: Anthony Ha
title: (No AI) Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
dc:creator: Anthony Ha
content: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.
contentSnippet: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

creator: Connie Loizos
title: (No AI) Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
dc:creator: Connie Loizos
content: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.
contentSnippet: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.

title: (No AI) A folk musician became a target for AI fakes and a copyright troll
author: Terrence O’Brien
content:
![Musician Murphy Campbell in a black and white photo that appears to be taken on an old-school large format film camera.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/0040566978_25.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Murphy Campbell is at the center of a brewing storm around AI and a broken copyright system. | Image: Murphy Campbell

In January, folk artist Murphy Campbell discovered several songs on her Spotify profile that [did not belong there](https://www.instagram.com/murphydoesnotmatter/reel/DTvZayRiZ4q/). They were songs that she had recorded, but she'd never uploaded them to Spotify, and something was off about the vocals.

She quickly surmised that someone had pulled performances of the songs she posted to YouTube, created AI covers, and uploaded them to streaming platforms under her name. I ran one of the songs, "Four Marys", through two different AI detectors, and it seemed to support her suspicions with both saying it was probably AI-generated.

Campbell was shocked, "I was kind of under the impression that we had a little b …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/entertainment/907111/murphy-campbell-folk-music-ai-copyright)

title: (No AI) Really, you made this without AI? Prove it
author: Jess Weatherbed
content:
![A crowd of robots surrounding someone with a robot captcha for a head.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/Human-made-ai-free-labels-hero.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

"This looks like AI."

It's a phrase I dread seeing as a writer who dabbles in illustration and amateur photography. In a world where generative AI technology is increasingly adept at mimicking the work of humans, people are naturally skeptical when online platforms [refuse to label even obvious AI content](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/882956/ai-deepfake-detection-labels-c2pa-instagram-youtube).

This leads me to one conclusion: maybe we should start labeling human-made text, images, audio, and video with something akin to a universally recognized Fair Trade logo. The machines sure as hell aren't motivated to label their work, but the creators at risk of being displaced most definitely are.

Fortunately, I'm not alone in my thinki …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/906453/human-made-ai-free-logo-creative-content)

title: (No AI) Hackers Are Posting the Claude Code Leak With Bonus Malware

creator: Maxwell Zeff, Zoë Schiffer, Lily Hay Newman
title: (No AI) Meta Pauses Work With Mercor After Data Breach Puts AI Industry Secrets at Risk
dc:creator: Maxwell Zeff, Zoë Schiffer, Lily Hay Newman
content: Major AI labs are investigating a security incident that impacted Mercor, a leading data vendor. The incident could have exposed key data about how they train AI models.
contentSnippet: Major AI labs are investigating a security incident that impacted Mercor, a leading data vendor. The incident could have exposed key data about how they train AI models.
